import React from 'react'; import styles from './Projects.module.css'; const Projects = () => { const projects = [ { id: 1, title: "E-Commerce Website", description: "A full-stack e-commerce platform built with React, Node.js, and MongoDB. Features include user authentication, shopping cart, payment integration, and admin panel.", technologies: ["React", "Node.js", "MongoDB", "Stripe", "Express"], image: "project1", github: "#", live: "#" }, { id: 2, title: "Task Management App", description: "A collaborative task management application with real-time updates. Built using React, Firebase, and Material-UI for a modern and responsive design.", technologies: ["React", "Firebase", "Material-UI", "Real-time DB"], image: "project2", github: "#", live: "#" }, { id: 3, title: "Weather Dashboard", description: "A responsive weather application that provides current weather and forecast data using OpenWeatherMap API. Features location-based search and weather maps.", technologies: ["React", "OpenWeather API", "CSS3", "Chart.js"], image: "project3", github: "#", live: "#" }, { id: 4, title: "Portfolio Website", description: "A modern, responsive portfolio website showcasing my work and skills. Built with React and featuring smooth animations and optimized performance.", technologies: ["React", "CSS3", "Framer Motion", "React Router"], image: "project4", github: "#", live: "#" }, { id: 5, title: "Social Media Dashboard", description: "A comprehensive social media analytics dashboard with data visualization, user engagement metrics, and campaign management tools.", technologies: ["React", "D3.js", "Node.js", "PostgreSQL"], image: "project5", github: "#", live: "#" }, { id: 6, title: "Recipe Finder App", description: "A recipe search and discovery application with filtering options, meal planning features, and ingredient-based search functionality.", technologies: ["React", "Recipe API", "Local Storage", "CSS Grid"], image: "project6", github: "#", live: "#" } ]; return (
